title: [Skyship, Hydration]
description: The metal bulkheads here are lined by a series of stone troughs filled with cloudy water.  Above each of these troughs, a weathered leather bladder is suspended from the ceiling.  From these bladders, stitched leather tubes attached to both the bulkheads and ceiling allow water to flow into the troughs.  The floor beneath is a hard-packed dirt marked periodically by water discoloration from where the leather tubes perpetually leak, along with large-printed footfalls from where people have gathered.
